text: PM KUSUM (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan): Aims to provide energy security to farmers in India by harnessing solar power. Eligibility: Individual farmers, groups of farmers, and cooperatives. Benefits: Subsidies up to 60% for installing standalone solar pumps and solarizing existing grid-connected pumps. Allows farmers to sell surplus power to the grid for additional income.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

text: Mission Shakti: An umbrella scheme for the safety, security, and empowerment of women. Eligibility: All women in India, especially those in difficult circumstances. Benefits: Includes 'Sambal' (One Stop Centres, Women Helpline, Beti Bachao Beti Padhao) and 'Samarthya' (Shakti Sadan, Sakhi Niwas, PMMVY). Provides 24/7 emergency response and long-term institutional support.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

text: FAME India Scheme (Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Hybrid and Electric Vehicles): Aims to promote the manufacturing and adoption of electric and hybrid vehicle technology. Eligibility: Buyers of electric/hybrid vehicles and manufacturers. Benefits: Direct purchase incentives (subsidies) for electric 2-wheelers, 3-wheelers, 4-wheelers, and buses. Reduces the cost gap between electric and internal combustion engine vehicles.

SVAMITVA (Survey of Villages Abadi and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas): A central sector scheme to provide an integrated property validation solution for rural India. Eligibility: Rural property owners. Benefits: Issuance of 'Property Cards' (Gharauni) to village household owners, enabling them to use their property as a financial asset for taking loans and other financial benefits.

PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal Scheme): Provides one hot cooked meal in Government and Government-aided schools. Eligibility: Children in Classes I to VIII. Benefits: Improves the nutritional status of school-age children, encourages enrollment and attendance, and promotes social equality by bringing children of different backgrounds together.
